product.name: 32 Inch Smart Portable TV, FHD Touch Screen Monitor on Wheels, Android 15, 8GB +128GB, Wireless Movable Display EDLA-Certified 5MP Camera 10W Stereo Speaker, 38,400 mAh Battery, Voice Airmouse Remote
features: 32” Touch Screen Built for Real Life, Not Just Watching: This large 32-inch FHD IPS touchscreen lets you do more than just watch—tap, scroll, swipe and interact with ease. From streaming shows and following workout videos to video calls and daily apps, everything feels clearer, bigger and more intuitive than on a phone, tablet or standard TV.

Android 15 Smart System — Turn It On and Start Using It: Powered by Android 15 and EDLA-certified, this smart portable TV works right out of the box. No TV box, no PC, no complicated setup—just connect to WiFi and access your apps, streaming content and services directly on the screen with smooth, reliable performance.

Go Anywhere Without Looking for a Power Outlet: With a built-in 38,400 mAh rechargeable battery, this smart screen keeps working even when unplugged. Roll it anywhere in your home or office without rearranging furniture or hunting for sockets—ideal for shared spaces, temporary setups and everyday flexibility.

Adjusts to You, Not the Other Way Around: The rolling stand offers smooth mobility, height adjustment, screen tilt and left-right rotation, so the display stays at a comfortable viewing angle whether you’re sitting, standing, exercising or relaxing in bed. One screen that fits different moments of your day.

Everything You Need for Calls and Classes, Built In: The built-in 5MP camera, microphone and speakers make video calls, online classes and meetings easy—no extra webcam or speaker needed. With voice remote support, you can search and navigate content quickly without reaching for the screen every time.
